label: phishing
subject: Your PayPal account has been SUSPENDED
body_snippet: Dear Customer, We detected unusual login activity on your PayPal account. Your account has been temporarily suspended. Click the link below within 24 hours to restore access or your account will be permanently closed. Verify Now: http://paypal-secure-login.tk/restore?token=A82k3X
red_flags: Misspelled domain (paypa1),Risky TLD (.tk),Urgent deadline,Generic greeting,Threatening language

label: phishing
subject: URGENT: Your Apple ID has been disabled
body_snippet: Your Apple ID (victim@gmail.com) was used to sign in to iCloud on a new device. If you did not do this your account may be compromised. Tap below to verify your identity: http://apple-id-support.gq/verify
red_flags: Risky TLD (.gq),Fake sender domain,Fear tactic,Suspicious URL

label: phishing
subject: Invoice #INV-98231 is due for payment
body_snippet: Hello, Please find attached your Amazon order invoice #INV-98231 for $349.99. If you did not authorize this charge click here immediately to cancel: http://amazon-billing.xyz/cancel?inv=98231

label: phishing
subject: Security Alert: Unusual transaction detected on your account
body_snippet: We have detected a suspicious transaction of £1200 from your Lloyds Bank account. To protect your funds we have temporarily frozen your account. Verify your details here: http://lloyds-secure-banking.ml/verify
red_flags: Risky TLD (.ml),Fake bank domain,Fear tactic,Account freeze threat

label: phishing
subject: CONGRATULATIONS! You have won $50000 USD!
body_snippet: Dear Winner, Your email address was selected in our annual sweepstake draw. You have won $50,000 USD! To claim your prize reply with your name, address, and bank account details. Alternatively visit: http://globalprize-claim.buzz/winner?id=TK8823
red_flags: Too good to be true,.buzz TLD,Requests personal info,Unsolicited

label: phishing
subject: Urgent wire transfer required - Confidential
body_snippet: Hi [Employee Name], I am currently in a meeting and need you to urgently process a wire transfer of $15,000 to a new vendor. This is time sensitive. Do not discuss with anyone until completed. I will explain when back. Please confirm by email. Regards CEO
red_flags: Misspelled domain,CEO impersonation,Urgency + secrecy,No attachment/link (social engineering)

subject: Your Microsoft 365 subscription has EXPIRED
